identity.mission: Create a high-precision, minimalist Network Looking Glass that feels like a professional sysadmin tool but looks like a Swiss design poster.
principles: Fusion: Terminal aesthetics mixed with Swiss typography.
Content: Data is the hero. No fluff.
Contrast: High contrast for readability (Black on White).
Spacing: Generous padding to prevent data density from feeling cluttered.

headings.usage: Main page titles, section headers. Big, bold, authoritative.

mono.usage: IP addresses, ping results, traceroute data, terminal outputs.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

terminal.style: bg-[#0F172A] text-[#F8FAFC] font-mono rounded-lg p-4 overflow-x-auto shadow-inner border border-gray-800

tabs.list: inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-muted p-1 text-muted-foreground
tabs.trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-background data-[state=active]:text-foreground data-[state=active]:shadow-sm

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 border border-white/20 shadow-lg (Use for sticky headers or floating controls)
visual_enhancers.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in specific 'hero' areas only if needed.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals. Keep it subtle.

images.description: Minimalist white server room. Use as a subtle background with low opacity (10-20%) in the hero section.
Abstract optic fiber. Use for the Speed Test section background or card visual.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #0F172A on #FFFFFF or #F8FAFC. Muted text should be #64748B.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'lucide-react', 'recharts' (for speed test graphs), 'framer-motion' (for smooth transitions).
2. Fonts: Import 'Chivo' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts.
3. Layout: Create a main 'Dashboard' layout. The top section is the 'Control Panel' (Source Location, Target IP, Test Type). The bottom section is the 'Results Terminal'.
4. Components: Use Shadcn 'Card' for the layout structure. Use 'Tabs' for switching between Ping, Traceroute, MTR.
5. Map: Create a simple visual representation of the 4 locations (Netherlands, Germany, Italy, Mumbai) using a static map image or simple SVG dots on a world map background.
6. Terminal: The results area MUST look like a terminal window (Dark background, Monospace text) to contrast with the Light theme UI. This is a key 'E1' design choice for this tool.
7. Speed Test: Use a gauge or simple progress bar visualization.
8. Mobile: Ensure the terminal window is scrollable horizontally on mobile.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' looks. Use custom padding and shadows.
